title: Replace 'Memory Increase' text with 'NeuroBoost' throughout the app

requirements.summary: Find and replace all occurrences of 'Memory Increase' (and case variants) with 'NeuroBoost' across all frontend source files including page components, layout components, home page hero sections, game cards, headings, labels, button text, and any other visible UI text
acceptanceCriteria: No visible text reading 'Memory Increase' (or any case variant) appears anywhere in the app UI
All previously 'Memory Increase' labeled text now displays 'NeuroBoost'
The app title/brand name 'NeuroBoost' remains unchanged in the header, browser tab, and SEO meta tags
All pages including HomePage, Layout header, and any game description cards are checked and updated

file_operations.description: Search for and replace all occurrences of 'Memory Increase' (case-insensitive) with 'NeuroBoost' in the hero section heading, subheading, game card titles, and game card descriptions. Verify the app brand name 'NeuroBoost' in the main heading remains unchanged.

Search for and replace any occurrences of 'Memory Increase' (case-insensitive) with 'NeuroBoost' in the header logo text, navigation labels, or any visible UI text. Ensure the app brand name 'NeuroBoost' in the header remains unchanged.

Search for and replace any hardcoded 'Memory Increase' text (case-insensitive) with 'NeuroBoost' in the title prop default values or any internal text rendering. Verify no 'Memory Increase' appears in the component.
Search for and replace any occurrences of 'Memory Increase' (case-insensitive) with 'NeuroBoost' in page headings, instructions, or button labels.
